sql: SELECT l1.start_date FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.interest_rate >= 52 ORDER BY l1.start_date LIMIT 60
SELECT c1.issued_on, c1.card_type FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_number LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.city
SELECT e1.hire_date, e1.position, e1.first_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.salary <> 834
SELECT c1.address, c1.created_at, c1.credit_score FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.address <> '123'
SELECT l1.id, l1.interest_rate, l1.customer_id, l1.end_date FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.interest_rate = 337 LIMIT 67
SELECT b1.id, b1.state, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.is_active
SELECT e1.salary, e1.id FROM employees AS e1 ORDER BY e1.salary
SELECT b1.state, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city = 'user' LIMIT 92
SELECT a1.account_type FROM accounts AS a1 LIMIT 82
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.id <> 893 ORDER BY c1.is_active LIMIT 39
SELECT b1.state, b1.manager_id, b1.is_active, b1.id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city = 'test'
SELECT a1.is_active, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 ORDER BY a1.is_active LIMIT 86
SELECT e1.first_name FROM employees AS e1 ORDER BY e1.position
SELECT e1.position, e1.hire_date FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.is_active = 0
SELECT l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.term_months <= 871
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.account_type = '123'
SELECT c1.card_number, c1.account_id FROM cards AS c1
SELECT b1.id, b1.employee_count, b1.manager_id, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1
SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.term_months, l1.customer_id FROM loans AS l1
SELECT l7.interest_rate, c1.created_at, c1.id, c1.credit_score FROM customers AS c1 LEFT JOIN loans AS l7 ON c1.id = l7.customer_id
SELECT t1.from_account_id, t1.description, t1.to_account_id, a3.account_type FROM transactions AS t1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a3 ON t1.to_account_id = a3.id
SELECT t1.from_account_id, a5.currency, t1.transaction_date, a5.is_active FROM transactions AS t1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a5 ON t1.to_account_id = a5.id WHERE a5.id = 404
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 LEFT JOIN loans AS l1 ON c1.id = l1.customer_id
SELECT e4.last_name, e4.branch_id, b1.id, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1 RIGHT JOIN employees AS e4 ON b1.id = e4.branch_id WHERE e4.salary <> 383
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 FULL JOIN transactions AS t6 ON a1.id = t6.to_account_id WHERE t6.transaction_type = 'activity'
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a4 ON c1.id = a4.customer_id WHERE a4.customer_id <> 869
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 LEFT JOIN customers AS c4 ON l1.customer_id = c4.id WHERE c4.phone LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a3 ON c1.id = a3.customer_id
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a1 ON c1.account_id = a1.id
SELECT e1.id, e1.is_active, e1.last_name, b5.is_active FROM employees AS e1 INNER JOIN branches AS b5 ON e1.branch_id = b5.id WHERE b5.state = 'admin'
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 FULL JOIN loans AS l5 ON c1.id = l5.customer_id WHERE l5.term_months >= 98
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a5 ON c1.account_id = a5.id WHERE a5.is_active = 1
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 RIGHT JOIN customers AS c4 ON a1.customer_id = c4.id
SELECT a1.customer_id, c4.card_number, c4.is_active, c4.expiry_date FROM accounts AS a1 RIGHT JOIN cards AS c4 ON a1.id = c4.account_id WHERE c4.credit_limit = 878
SELECT e3.id, e3.position, e3.salary, b1.id FROM branches AS b1 INNER JOIN employees AS e3 ON b1.id = e3.branch_id WHERE e3.branch_id >= 375
SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.account_type, t2.description, t2.to_account_id FROM accounts AS a1 INNER JOIN transactions AS t2 ON a1.id = t2.to_account_id WHERE t2.description LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a7 ON c1.account_id = a7.id WHERE a7.opened_on < DATETIME('now', '-19 days')
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a1 ON c1.id = a1.customer_id
SELECT c1.phone, c1.is_active, a8.balance, a8.customer_id FROM customers AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a8 ON c1.id = a8.customer_id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM transactions AS inner_transactions WHERE inner_transactions.amount >= 697) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.description <> '123'
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.account_type = 'admin')
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 JOIN employees AS e2 ON e1.branch_id = e2.branch_id AND e1.id <> e2.id LIMIT 12
SELECT b1.state FROM branches AS b1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees AS sub_e WHERE sub_e.branch_id = b1.id AND sub_e.is_active = 0)
SELECT a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id IN (SELECT sub_c.account_id FROM cards AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.card_type LIKE 'b%')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.customer_id > 53) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.employee_count >= 127) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <= 984
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 JOIN employees AS e2 ON e1.branch_id = e2.branch_id AND e1.id <> e2.id
SELECT c1.credit_score, c1.is_active FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.customer_id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.customer_id < 788)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM customers AS inner_customers WHERE inner_customers.date_of_birth <= DATETIME('now', '-11 days')) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.phone = 'test'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.is_active = 0) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.manager_id < 523
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id IN (SELECT sub_b.id FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.manager_id = 762)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM loans AS inner_loans WHERE inner_loans.start_date > DATETIME('now', '-22 days')) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.customer_id <= 195
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.id <= 278) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.customer_id >= 748
SELECT e1.position, e1.first_name, e1.is_active, e1.hire_date FROM employees AS e1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.id = e1.branch_id AND sub_b.employee_count <= 619)
SELECT c1.credit_limit FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.opened_on >= DATETIME('now', '-26 days'))
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.currency LIKE '%a%') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <= 289
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.id < 190) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.interest_rate <> 585)
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.interest_rate > 976)
SELECT a1.opened_on, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.interest_rate <= 45 UNION SELECT a2.opened_on, a2.customer_id FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.opened_on > DATETIME('now', '-4 days')

SELECT c1.id, c1.first_name, c1.credit_score, c1.last_name FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.phone <> 'test' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.first_name, c2.credit_score, c2.last_name FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.date_of_birth >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days')

SELECT b1.employee_count, b1.city, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.is_active = 0 UNION ALL SELECT b2.employee_count, b2.city, b2.is_active FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.is_active = 1 ORDER BY employee_count LIMIT 48

SELECT b1.is_active, b1.employee_count, b1.city, b1.id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city <> 'user' UNION ALL SELECT b2.is_active, b2.employee_count, b2.city, b2.id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.id < 203

SELECT l1.interest_rate, l1.customer_id, l1.id, l1.principal_amount FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id <= 747 UNION ALL SELECT l2.interest_rate, l2.customer_id, l2.id, l2.principal_amount FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.status = 'test'
SELECT l1.monthly_payment, l1.term_months FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.principal_amount <> 348 UNION SELECT l2.monthly_payment, l2.term_months FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.status <> 'user'

SELECT t1.id, t1.to_account_id, t1.description FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_type LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT t2.id, t2.to_account_id, t2.description FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.description LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY id

SELECT t1.description, t1.status, t1.amount, t1.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.from_account_id <= 338 UNION SELECT t2.description, t2.status, t2.amount, t2.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.transaction_date < DATETIME('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY description
SELECT t1.status, t1.id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.id >= 411 UNION SELECT t2.status, t2.id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.to_account_id < 592
SELECT l1.status, l1.end_date FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.term_months <= 247 UNION ALL SELECT l2.status, l2.end_date FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.monthly_payment <= 835 LIMIT 41
SELECT t1.transaction_type, t1.id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id < 937 UNION SELECT t2.transaction_type, t2.id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.amount <= 330

SELECT t1.status, t1.amount, t1.description FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_type = '123' UNION ALL SELECT t2.status, t2.amount, t2.description FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.amount <> 450 LIMIT 49

SELECT c1.id, c1.credit_score, c1.first_name FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.credit_score <> 871 UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.credit_score, c2.first_name FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.address LIKE '%a%' LIMIT 36

SELECT a1.opened_on, a1.account_type, a1.is_active FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.account_type = 'test' UNION SELECT a2.opened_on, a2.account_type, a2.is_active FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.interest_rate <> 931 LIMIT 37
SELECT t1.description, t1.transaction_type FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.amount > 846 UNION ALL SELECT t2.description, t2.transaction_type FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.transaction_type = '123'
SELECT l1.end_date, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.interest_rate < 278 UNION SELECT l2.end_date, l2.loan_type FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.status = 'activity' ORDER BY end_date
SELECT b1.state, b1.manager_id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count <= 771 UNION SELECT b2.state, b2.manager_id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.name <> 'admin'

SELECT b1.employee_count, b1.manager_id, b1.id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count <> 7 UNION SELECT b2.employee_count, b2.manager_id, b2.id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.id < 452 ORDER BY employee_count LIMIT 30

SELECT l1.end_date, l1.interest_rate, l1.loan_type, l1.start_date FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.status = 'admin' UNION SELECT l2.end_date, l2.interest_rate, l2.loan_type, l2.start_date FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.start_date <= DATETIME('now', '-12 days')

SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.loan_type, l1.customer_id FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.monthly_payment > 126 UNION SELECT l2.principal_amount, l2.loan_type, l2.customer_id FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.interest_rate <= 201 ORDER BY principal_amount LIMIT 38

UPDATE customers SET created_at = DATETIME('now') WHERE customers.address LIKE 'b%'
UPDATE employees SET salary = 409 WHERE employees.is_active = 0
UPDATE transactions SET to_account_id = 735 WHERE transactions.transaction_type = 'activity'
UPDATE accounts SET currency = 'Updated text 37' WHERE accounts.id > 527
UPDATE cards SET account_id = 891 WHERE cards.credit_limit <= 648
UPDATE employees SET is_active = 0 WHERE employees.salary = 445
UPDATE accounts SET account_type = 'Updated text 94' WHERE accounts.interest_rate < 51
UPDATE cards SET expiry_date = DATETIME('now') WHERE cards.issued_on <= DATETIME('now', '-26 days')
UPDATE cards SET expiry_date = DATETIME('now') WHERE cards.card_type <> '123'
UPDATE loans SET interest_rate = 890 WHERE loans.loan_type LIKE '%c'
UPDATE transactions SET to_account_id = 514 WHERE transactions.to_account_id = 614
UPDATE accounts SET is_active = 0 WHERE accounts.interest_rate <> 212
UPDATE employees SET hire_date = DATETIME('now') WHERE employees.hire_date >= DATETIME('now', '-22 days')
UPDATE cards SET card_number = 'Updated text 25' WHERE cards.card_number = '123'
